# fetch

Plugin for fetching and parsing ABIs from network resource with `fetch`.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/fetch.md","from":100,"to":143}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { fetch } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'
```

## Usage

```ts{2,6-23}
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/fetch.md","from":172,"to":853}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { fetch } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    fetch({
      contracts: [
        {
          name: 'Wagmigotchi',
          address: '0xecb504d39723b0be0e3a9aa33d646642d1051ee1',
        },
      ],
      request(contract) {
        if (!contract.address) throw new Error('address is required')
        const address =
          typeof contract.address === 'string'
            ? contract.address
            : Object.values(contract.address)[0]
        return {
          url: `https://api.etherscan.io/api?module=contract&action=getabi&address=${address}`,
        }
      },
    }),
  ],
})
```

## Configuration

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/fetch.md","from":883,"to":937}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type FetchConfig } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'
```

### cacheDuration

`number | undefined`

* Duration in milliseconds to cache ABIs.
* Defaults to `1_800_000` (30 minutes).

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/fetch.md","from":1072,"to":1800}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { fetch } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    fetch({
      cacheDuration: 300_000, // [!code focus]
      contracts: [
        {
          name: 'Wagmigotchi',
          address: '0xecb504d39723b0be0e3a9aa33d646642d1051ee1',
        },
      ],
      request(contract) {
        if (!contract.address) throw new Error('address is required')
        const address =
          typeof contract.address === 'string'
            ? contract.address
            : Object.values(contract.address)[0]
        return {
          url: `https://api.etherscan.io/api?module=contract&action=getabi&address=${address}`,
        }
      },
    }),
  ],
})
```

### contracts

`{ name: string; address?: Address | Record<number, Address> | undefined }[]`

Contracts to fetch ABIs for.

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/fetch.md","from":1935,"to":2719}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { fetch } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    fetch({
      contracts: [ // [!code focus]
        { // [!code focus]
          name: 'Wagmigotchi', // [!code focus]
          address: '0xecb504d39723b0be0e3a9aa33d646642d1051ee1', // [!code focus]
        }, // [!code focus]
      ], // [!code focus]
      request(contract) {
        if (!contract.address) throw new Error('address is required')
        const address =
          typeof contract.address === 'string'
            ? contract.address
            : Object.values(contract.address)[0]
        return {
          url: `https://api.etherscan.io/api?module=contract&action=getabi&address=${address}`,
        }
      },
    }),
  ],
})

```

### getCacheKey

`((config: { contract: { address: Address | Record<chainId, Address> | undefined; name: string } }) => string) | undefined`

* Function for creating a cache key for contract. Contract data is cached at `~/.wagmi-cli/plugins/fetch/cache/`.
* Defaults to `({ contract }) => JSON.stringify(contract)`.

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/fetch.md","from":3047,"to":4015}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { fetch } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    fetch({
      contracts: [
        {
          name: 'wagmigotchi',
          address: '0xecb504d39723b0be0e3a9aa33d646642d1051ee1',
        },
      ],
      getCacheKey({ contract }) { // [!code focus]
        if (typeof contract.address === 'string') // [!code focus]
          return `${name}:${contract.address}` // [!code focus]
        return `${name}:${JSON.stringify(contract.address)}` // [!code focus]
      }, // [!code focus]
      request(contract) {
        if (!contract.address) throw new Error('address is required')
        const address =
          typeof contract.address === 'string'
            ? contract.address
            : Object.values(contract.address)[0]
        return {
          url: `https://api.etherscan.io/api?module=contract&action=getabi&address=${address}`,
        }
      },
    }),
  ],
})

```

### name

`string`

* Name of source.
* Defaults to `'Fetch'`.

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/fetch.md","from":4090,"to":4813}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { fetch } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    fetch({
      contracts: [
        {
          name: 'Wagmigotchi',
          address: '0xecb504d39723b0be0e3a9aa33d646642d1051ee1',
        },
      ],
      name: 'Etherscan', // [!code focus]
      request(contract) {
        if (!contract.address) throw new Error('address is required')
        const address =
          typeof contract.address === 'string'
            ? contract.address
            : Object.values(contract.address)[0]
        return {
          url: `https://api.etherscan.io/api?module=contract&action=getabi&address=${address}`,
        }
      },
    }),
  ],
})
```

### parse

`((config: { response: Response }) => Abi | Promise<Abi>) | undefined`

* Function for parsing ABI from fetch response.
* Defaults to `({ response }) => response.json()`

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/fetch.md","from":5006,"to":5949}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { fetch } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'
 
export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    fetch({
      contracts: [
        {
          name: 'Wagmigotchi',
          address: '0xecb504d39723b0be0e3a9aa33d646642d1051ee1',
        },
      ],
      async parse({ response }) { // [!code focus]
        const json = await response.json() // [!code focus]
        if (json.status === '0') throw new Error(json.message) // [!code focus]
        return json.result // [!code focus]
      }, // [!code focus]
      request(contract) {
        if (!contract.address) throw new Error('address is required')
        const address =
          typeof contract.address === 'string'
            ? contract.address
            : Object.values(contract.address)[0]
        return {
          url: `https://api.etherscan.io/api?module=contract&action=getabi&address=${address}`,
        }
      },
    }),
  ],
})
```

### request

`(config: { address?: Address | Record<chainId, Address> | undefined }) => { url: RequestInfo; init?: RequestInit | undefined } | Promise<{ url: RequestInfo; init?: RequestInit | undefined }>`

Function for returning a request to fetch ABI from.

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/fetch.md","from":6220,"to":7072}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { fetch } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    fetch({
      contracts: [
        {
          name: 'Wagmigotchi',
          address: '0xecb504d39723b0be0e3a9aa33d646642d1051ee1',
        },
      ],
      request(contract) { // [!code focus]
        if (!contract.address) throw new Error('address is required') // [!code focus]
        const address = // [!code focus]
          typeof contract.address === 'string' // [!code focus]
            ? contract.address // [!code focus]
            : Object.values(contract.address)[0] // [!code focus]
        return { // [!code focus]
          url: `https://api.etherscan.io/api?module=contract&action=getabi&address=${address}`, // [!code focus]
        } // [!code focus]
      }, // [!code focus]
    }),
  ],
})

```

---

---
url: /cli/api/plugins/foundry.md
---
# foundry

Plugin for resolving ABIs from [Foundry](https://github.com/foundry-rs/foundry) projects. Supports [`watch`](/cli/api/commands/generate#w-watch) mode.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/foundry.md","from":180,"to":225}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { foundry } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'
```

## Usage

```ts{2,6-8}
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/foundry.md","from":253,"to":449}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { foundry } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    foundry({
      project: '../hello_foundry',
    }),
  ],
})
```

## Configuration

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/foundry.md","from":478,"to":534}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type FoundryConfig } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'
```

### artifacts

`string | undefined`

* Project's artifacts directory. Same as your `foundry.toml`/`forge`s `--out` (`-o`) option.
* Defaults to `'out/'`.

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/foundry.md","from":700,"to":903}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { foundry } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    foundry({
      artifacts: 'out/', // [!code focus]
    }),
  ],
})
```

### includeBroadcasts

`boolean | undefined`

Automatically detect contract deployments from Foundry's `run-latest.json` files in the `broadcast/` directory.

* The `deployments` mapping can be used to override broadcast deployments for the same contract.
* Broadcasts are read once when `wagmi generate` runs. To pick up new broadcast deployments after running deploy scripts, rerun the generate command.
* Defaults to `false`.

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/foundry.md","from":1344,"to":1553}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { foundry } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    foundry({
      includeBroadcasts: true, // [!code focus]
    }),
  ],
})
```

### deployments

`{ [key: string]: address?: Address | Record<chainId, Address> | undefined } | undefined`

Mapping of addresses to attach to artifacts.

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/foundry.md","from":1718,"to":2159}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { foundry } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    foundry({
      deployments: { // [!code focus]
        Counter: { // [!code focus]
          1: '0x314159265dd8dbb310642f98f50c066173c1259b', // [!code focus]
          5: '0x112234455c3a32fd11230c42e7bccd4a84e02010', // [!code focus]
        }, // [!code focus]
      }, // [!code focus]
    }),
  ],
})
```

### exclude

`string[] | undefined`

Artifact files to exclude relative to `artifacts`. Supports glob patterns.

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/foundry.md","from":2283,"to":3324}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { foundry } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    foundry({
      exclude: [ // [!code focus]
        // the following patterns are excluded by default // [!code focus]
        'Common.sol/**', // [!code focus]
        'Components.sol/**', // [!code focus]
        'Script.sol/**', // [!code focus]
        'StdAssertions.sol/**', // [!code focus]
        'StdInvariant.sol/**', // [!code focus]
        'StdError.sol/**', // [!code focus]
        'StdCheats.sol/**', // [!code focus]
        'StdMath.sol/**', // [!code focus]
        'StdJson.sol/**', // [!code focus]
        'StdStorage.sol/**', // [!code focus]
        'StdUtils.sol/**', // [!code focus]
        'Vm.sol/**', // [!code focus]
        'console.sol/**', // [!code focus]
        'console2.sol/**', // [!code focus]
        'test.sol/**', // [!code focus]
        '**.s.sol/*.json', // [!code focus]
        '**.t.sol/*.json', // [!code focus]
      ], // [!code focus]
    }),
  ],
})
```

### forge

`{ clean?: boolean | undefined; build?: boolean | undefined; path?: string | undefined; rebuild?: boolean | undefined } | undefined`

Options for `forge`.

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/foundry.md","from":3502,"to":3891}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { foundry } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    foundry({
      forge: {  // [!code focus]
        clean: true,  // [!code focus]
        build: true,  // [!code focus]
        path: 'path/to/forge',  // [!code focus]
        rebuild: true,  // [!code focus]
      },  // [!code focus]
    }),
  ],
})
```

#### clean

* Remove build artifacts and cache directories on start up.
* Defaults to `false`.

#### build

* Build Foundry project before fetching artifacts.
* Defaults to `true`.

#### path

* Path to `forge` executable command.
* Defaults to `forge`.

#### rebuild

* Rebuild every time a watched file or directory is changed. Used for setting up [`watch`](/cli/api/commands/generate#w-watch) mode.
* Defaults to `true`.

### include

`string[] | undefined`

Artifact files to include relative to `artifacts`. Supports glob patterns.

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/foundry.md","from":4440,"to":4775}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { foundry } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    foundry({
      include: [  // [!code focus]
        // the following patterns are included by default  // [!code focus]
        '*.json',  // [!code focus]
      ],  // [!code focus]
    }),
  ],
})
```

### namePrefix

`string | undefined`

Prefix to prepend to artifact names. Useful for preventing name collisions between contracts from other sources.

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/foundry.md","from":4938,"to":5187}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { foundry } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    foundry({  // [!code focus]
      namePrefix: 'HelloFoundry',  // [!code focus]
    }),  // [!code focus]
  ],
})
```

### project

`string | undefined`

* Path to Foundry project.
* Defaults to Foundry configuration using `forge config --json` command.

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/plugins/foundry.md","from":5334,"to":5581}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { foundry } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    foundry({ // [!code focus]
      project: '../hello_foundry', // [!code focus]
    }), // [!code focus]
  ],
})
```

---
url: /core/guides/framework-adapters.md
---
# Framework Adapters

Folks often ask if they can use Wagmi with other frameworks, like Svelte, Solid.js, and more.

The short answer is — you already can! Wagmi Core is pure VanillaJS that you can use with any framework. For some, this answer is (understandably) unsatisfying as they want a tight integration between Wagmi Core and their favorite framework's reactivity system, e.g. what Wagmi is for React and Vue.

Someday, we would love to support additional frameworks, but unfortunately the core team doesn't have time to build and support them in a high-quality way at the moment. This could change in the future with additional [sponsors](https://github.com/sponsors/wevm), reshuffling of the roadmap, or if someone from the community wants to lead the effort.

In the meantime, here are some tips on how to create tighter bonds between Wagmi Core and other frameworks.

## Dependency Injection

Once you create a Wagmi Config, you'll need to make sure your framework has access to it inside your higher-level functions (e.g. hooks for React, composables for Vue). For example, Wagmi uses [React Context](https://react.dev/learn/passing-data-deeply-with-context) to inject the Config into React Hooks and update it if it changes. This makes it so your users don't need to pass a Config object every time they use a hook.

## Reactivity Layer

All frameworks approach reactivity in a different way. To hook into your favorite frameworks, reactivity system, it's often helpful to see what other popular libraries for your framework are doing.

The most important thing to hook up Wagmi Core with your framework is to make sure changes to the Wagmi Config are tracked. This enables behavior, like switching chains or connecting accounts, to propagate throughout your app and update state. Check out [`useConnection`](https://github.com/wevm/wagmi/blob/main/packages/react/src/hooks/useConnection.ts), [`useChainId`](https://github.com/wevm/wagmi/blob/main/packages/react/src/hooks/useChainId.ts), [`useClient`](https://github.com/wevm/wagmi/blob/main/packages/react/src/hooks/useClient.ts), and [`useConnectorClient`](https://github.com/wevm/wagmi/blob/main/packages/react/src/hooks/useConnectorClient.ts) — versions of these for your framework are important to get right as they power a lot of internals.

## TanStack Query

Wagmi uses [TanStack Query](https://tanstack.com/query) to enable caching, deduplication, persistence, and more in React and Vue applications. Normally, you would need to find a similar library for your framework, but the good news is TanStack Query supports other frameworks! (Svelte, Solid, and Angular at the time of writing.)

To get started with your framework, install and set up the related TanStack Query adapter. Next, import query keys/functions and mutation functions from the `'@wagmi/core/query'` entrypoint. You can plug these directly into your framework's TanStack Query adapter functions.

If you are building a library, you'll also want to make sure that you wire up generics correctly so type-inference and safety work correctly. The best way to make sure you are doing this correctly, is to see how we do this for React with Wagmi by checking out the [source code](https://github.com/wevm/wagmi/tree/main/packages/react/src/hooks).

## Testing

If you are building a library, you'll want to write tests. Wagmi uses [React Testing Library](https://testing-library.com/docs/react-testing-library/intro) to test hooks. [Testing Library](https://testing-library.com) also supports other frameworks, like Svelte, Solid, and more. You can take a look at how the React tests work and do something similar for your code.

## Proxy Exports

Wagmi proxies exports directly from Wagmi Core and [Viem](https://viem.sh) to make importing easier. You'll likely want to imitate this behavior for your framework.

# generate

Generates code based on configuration, using `contracts` and `plugins`.

## Usage

```bash
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/commands/generate.md","from":103,"to":119}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
wagmi generate 
```

## Options

### -c, --config \<path>

`string`

Path to config file.

```bash
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/commands/generate.md","from":203,"to":243}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
wagmi generate --config wagmi.config.ts
```

### -r, --root \<path>

`string`

Root path to resolve config from.

```bash
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/commands/generate.md","from":326,"to":361}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
wagmi generate --root path/to/root
```

### -w, --watch

`boolean`

Watch for changes (for plugins that support watch mode).

```bash
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/commands/generate.md","from":460,"to":483}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
wagmi generate --watch
```

### -h, --help

Displays help message.

```bash
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/api/commands/generate.md","from":536,"to":558}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
wagmi generate --help
```

# getBalance

Action for fetching native currency balance.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBalance.md","from":199,"to":240}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBalance } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBalance.md","from":287,"to":460}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBalance } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const balance = getBalance(config, {
  address: '0x4557B18E779944BFE9d78A672452331C186a9f48',
})
```

## Parameters

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBalance.md","from":531,"to":587}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetBalanceParameters } from '@wagmi/core'
```

### address

`Address`

Address to get balance for.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBalance.md","from":677,"to":867}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBalance } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const balance = getBalance(config, {
  address: '0x4557B18E779944BFE9d78A672452331C186a9f48', // [!code focus]
})
```

***

### blockNumber

`bigint | undefined`

Block number to get balance at.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBalance.md","from":1026,"to":1242}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBalance } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const balance = getBalance(config, {
  address: '0x4557B18E779944BFE9d78A672452331C186a9f48',
  blockNumber: 17829139n, // [!code focus]
})
```

### blockTag

`'latest' | 'earliest' | 'pending' | 'safe' | 'finalized' | undefined`

Block tag to get balance at.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBalance.md","from":1440,"to":1652}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBalance } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const balance = getBalance(config, {
  address: '0x4557B18E779944BFE9d78A672452331C186a9f48',
  blockTag: 'latest', // [!code focus]
})
```

***

### chainId

`config['chains'][number]['id'] | undefined`

ID of chain to use when fetching data.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBalance.md","from":1838,"to":2102}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBalance } from '@wagmi/core'
import { mainnet } from '@wagmi/core/chains'
import { config } from './config'

const balance = await getBalance(config, {
  address: '0x4557B18E779944BFE9d78A672452331C186a9f48',
  chainId: mainnet.id, // [!code focus]
})
```

## Return Type

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBalance.md","from":2174,"to":2230}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetBalanceReturnType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

### decimals

`number`

Number of decimals for balance [`value`](#value).

### symbol

`string`

Symbol of native currency.

### value

`bigint`

Raw value of balance.

## Error

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBalance.md","from":2420,"to":2475}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetBalanceErrorType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## TanStack Query

```ts-vue
import {
  type {{typeName}}Data,
  type {{typeName}}Options,
  type {{typeName}}QueryFnData,
  type {{typeName}}QueryKey,
  {{actionName}}QueryKey,
  {{actionName}}QueryOptions,
} from '{{packageName}}/query'
```

## Viem

* [`getBalance`](https://viem.sh/docs/actions/public/getBalance) for native currency balances
* [`multicall`](https://viem.sh/docs/contract/multicall) for token balances

# getBlobBaseFee

Action for fetching the current blob base fee (in wei).

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlobBaseFee.md","from":222,"to":267}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBlobBaseFee } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlobBaseFee.md","from":314,"to":443}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBlobBaseFee } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const blobBaseFee = await getBlobBaseFee(config)
```

## Parameters

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlobBaseFee.md","from":514,"to":574}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetBlobBaseFeeParameters } from '@wagmi/core'
```

### chainId

`config['chains'][number]['id'] | undefined`

ID of chain to use when fetching data.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlobBaseFee.md","from":710,"to":929}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBlobBaseFee } from '@wagmi/core'
import { mainnet } from '@wagmi/core/chains'
import { config } from './config'

const blobBaseFee = await getBlobBaseFee(config, {
  chainId: mainnet.id, // [!code focus]
})
```

## Return Type

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlobBaseFee.md","from":1001,"to":1061}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetBlobBaseFeeReturnType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

`bigint`

Current blob base fee (in wei).

## Error

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlobBaseFee.md","from":1125,"to":1184}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetBlobBaseFeeErrorType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

```ts-vue
import {
  type {{typeName}}Data,
  type {{typeName}}Options,
  type {{typeName}}QueryFnData,
  type {{typeName}}QueryKey,
  {{actionName}}QueryKey,
  {{actionName}}QueryOptions,

```

* [`getBlobBaseFee`](https://viem.sh/docs/actions/public/getBlobBaseFee)

url: /core/api/actions/getBlock.md

# getBlock

Action for fetching information about a block at a block number, hash or tag.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlock.md","from":226,"to":265}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBlock } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlock.md","from":312,"to":429}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBlock } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const blockNumber = await getBlock(config)
```

## Parameters

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlock.md","from":500,"to":554}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetBlockParameters } from '@wagmi/core'
```

### blockHash

`` `0x${string}` ``

Information at a given block hash.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlock.md","from":663,"to":884}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBlock } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const blockNumber = await getBlock(config, {
  blockHash: '0x89644bbd5c8d682a2e9611170e6c1f02573d866d286f006cbf517eec7254ec2d' // [!code focus]
})
```

### blockNumber

`bigint`

Information at a given block number.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlock.md","from":1035,"to":1196}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBlock } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const blockNumber = await getBlock(config, {
  blockNumber: 42069n // [!code focus]
})
```

### blockTag

`'latest' | 'earliest' | 'pending' | 'safe' | 'finalized'`

Information at a given block tag. Defaults to `'latest'`.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlock.md","from":1415,"to":1576}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBlock } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const blockNumber = await getBlock(config, {
  blockTag: 'pending' // [!code focus]
})
```

### chainId

`config['chains'][number]['id'] | undefined`

ID of chain to use when fetching data.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlock.md","from":1757,"to":1964}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBlock } from '@wagmi/core'
import { mainnet } from '@wagmi/core/chains'
import { config } from './config'

const blockNumber = await getBlock(config, {
  chainId: mainnet.id, // [!code focus]
})
```

### includeTransactions

`boolean`

Whether or not to include transactions as objects.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlock.md","from":2134,"to":2301}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBlock } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const blockNumber = await getBlock(config, {
  includeTransactions: true // [!code focus]
})
```

## Return Type

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlock.md","from":2373,"to":2427}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetBlockReturnType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

[`Block`](https://viem.sh/docs/glossary/types#block)

Information about the block.

## Error

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlock.md","from":2532,"to":2585}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetBlockErrorType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## TanStack Query

```ts-vue
import {
  type {{typeName}}Data,
```

# getBlockNumber

Action for fetching the number of the most recent block seen.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlockNumber.md","from":228,"to":273}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBlockNumber } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlockNumber.md","from":320,"to":449}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBlockNumber } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const blockNumber = await getBlockNumber(config)
```

## Parameters

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlockNumber.md","from":520,"to":580}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetBlockNumberParameters } from '@wagmi/core'
```

### cacheTime

`number | undefined`

Time in milliseconds that cached block number will remain in memory.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlockNumber.md","from":724,"to":895}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBlockNumber } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const blockNumber = await getBlockNumber(config, {
  cacheTime: 4_000, // [!code focus]
})
```

### chainId

`config['chains'][number]['id'] | undefined`

ID of chain to use when fetching data.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlockNumber.md","from":1076,"to":1295}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBlockNumber } from '@wagmi/core'
import { mainnet } from '@wagmi/core/chains'
import { config } from './config'

const blockNumber = await getBlockNumber(config, {
  chainId: mainnet.id, // [!code focus]
})
```

## Return Type

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlockNumber.md","from":1367,"to":1427}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetBlockNumberReturnType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

`bigint`

Most recent block number seen.

## Error

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBlockNumber.md","from":1490,"to":1549}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetBlockNumberErrorType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

# getBlockTransactionCount

Action for fetching the number of Transactions at a block number, hash or tag.

## Import

```ts

```

## Usage

::: code-group


# getBytecode

Action for retrieving the bytecode at an address.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBytecode.md","from":207,"to":249}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBytecode } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBytecode.md","from":296,"to":461}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBytecode } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

await getBytecode(config, {
  address: '0xFBA3912Ca04dd458c843e2EE08967fC04f3579c2',
})
```

## Parameters

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBytecode.md","from":532,"to":589}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetBytecodeParameters } from '@wagmi/core'
```

### address

`Address`

The contract address.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBytecode.md","from":673,"to":855}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBytecode } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

await getBytecode(config, {
  address: '0xFBA3912Ca04dd458c843e2EE08967fC04f3579c2', // [!code focus]
})
```

### blockNumber

`bigint | undefined`

The block number to check the bytecode at.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBytecode.md","from":1020,"to":1228}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBytecode } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

await getBytecode(config, {
  address: '0xFBA3912Ca04dd458c843e2EE08967fC04f3579c2',
  blockNumber: 16280770n, // [!code focus]
})
```

### blockTag

`'latest' | 'earliest' | 'pending' | 'safe' | 'finalized' | undefined`

The block tag to check the bytecode at.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBytecode.md","from":1437,"to":1639}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBytecode } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

await getBytecode(config, {
  address: '0xFBA3912Ca04dd458c843e2EE08967fC04f3579c2',
  blockTag: 'safe', // [!code focus]
})
```

### chainId

`config['chains'][number]['id'] | undefined`

The chain ID to check the bytecode at.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBytecode.md","from":1820,"to":2070}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getBytecode } from '@wagmi/core'
import { mainnet } from '@wagmi/core/chains'
import { config } from './config'

await getBytecode(config, {
  chainId: mainnet.id, // [!code focus]
  address: '0xFBA3912Ca04dd458c843e2EE08967fC04f3579c2',
})
```

## Return Type

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBytecode.md","from":2142,"to":2199}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetBytecodeReturnType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

`Hex`

The contract's bytecode.

## Error

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getBytecode.md","from":2253,"to":2309}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetBytecodeErrorType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

# getCallsStatus

Action to fetch the status and receipts of a call batch that was sent via [`sendCalls`](/core/api/actions/sendCalls).

[Read more.](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/1663ea2e7a683285f977eda51c32cec86553f585/EIPS/eip-5792.md#wallet_getcallsstatus)

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getCallsStatus.md","from":417,"to":462}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getCallsStatus } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getCallsStatus.md","from":509,"to":666}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getCallsStatus } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const status = await getCallsStatus(config, {
  id: '0x1234567890abcdef',
})
```

## Parameters

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getCallsStatus.md","from":737,"to":797}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetCallsStatusParameters } from '@wagmi/core'
```

### connector

`Connector | undefined`

Connector to get call statuses with.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getCallsStatus.md","from":912,"to":1185}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getConnections, getCallsStatus } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const connections = getConnections(config)
const status = await getCallsStatus(config, {
  connector: connections[0]?.connector, // [!code focus]
  id: '0x1234567890abcdef',
})
```

### id

`string`

Identifier of the call batch.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getCallsStatus.md","from":1316,"to":1490}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getCallsStatus } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const status = await getCallsStatus(config, {
  id: '0x1234567890abcdef', // [!code focus]
})
```

## Return Type

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getCallsStatus.md","from":1562,"to":1622}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetCallsStatusReturnType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

`{ status: 'PENDING' | 'CONFIRMED', receipts: TransactionReceipt[] }`

The status and receipts of the call batch.

## Error

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getCallsStatus.md","from":1758,"to":1817}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetCallsStatusErrorType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

# getCapabilities

Action to extract capabilities (grouped by chain ID) that a connected wallet supports (e.g. paymasters, session keys, etc).

[Read more.](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/815028dc634463e1716fc5ce44c019a6040f0bef/EIPS/eip-5792.md#wallet_getcapabilities)

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getCapabilities.md","from":430,"to":476}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getCapabilities } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getCapabilities.md","from":523,"to":655}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

import { config } from './config'

const capabilities = await getCapabilities(config)
```

## Parameters

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getCapabilities.md","from":726,"to":787}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

```

### account

`Account | Address | undefined`

Fetch capabilities for the provided account.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]

  account: '0xA0Cf798816D4b9b9866b5330EEa46a18382f251e', // [!code focus]
})
```

### connector

`Connector | undefined`

Connector to get capabilities from.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getCapabilities.md","from":1286,"to":1539}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

import { config } from './config'

const capabilities = await getCapabilities(config, {
  connector: connections[0]?.connector, // [!code focus]
})
```

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getCapabilities.md","from":1611,"to":1672}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

```

`bigint`

Most recent block number seen.

```ts
import { type GetCapabilitiesErrorType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

# getChainId

Action for getting current chain ID.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getChainId.md","from":70,"to":111}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getChainId } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getChainId.md","from":158,"to":269}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getChainId } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const chainId = getChainId(config)
```

## Return Type

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getChainId.md","from":341,"to":397}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetChainIdReturnType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

`number`

Current chain ID from [`config.state.chainId`](/core/api/createConfig#chainid).

::: info
Only returns chain IDs for chains configured via `createConfig`'s [`chains`](/core/api/createConfig#chains) parameter.

If the active [connection](/core/api/createConfig#connection) [`chainId`](/core/api/createConfig#chainid-1) is not from a chain included in your Wagmi `Config`, `getChainId` will return the last configured chain ID.
:::

---

url: /core/api/actions/getChains.md

# getConnection

Action for getting current connection.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getConnection.md","from":74,"to":118}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getConnection } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getConnection.md","from":165,"to":285}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getConnection } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const connection = getConnection(config)
```

## Return Type

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getConnection.md","from":357,"to":416}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetConnectionReturnType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

### address

`Address | undefined`

* Connected address from connector.
* Defaults to first address in [`addresses`](#addresses).

### addresses

`readonly Address[] | undefined`

Connected addresses from connector.

### chain

`Chain | undefined`

Connected chain from connector. If chain is not configured by config, it will be `undefined`.

### chainId

`number | undefined`

Connected chain id from connector.

### connector

`Connector | undefined`

Connected connector.

### isConnecting / isReconnecting / isConnected / isDisconnected

`boolean`

Boolean variables derived from [`status`](#status).

### status

`'connecting' | 'reconnecting' | 'connected' | 'disconnected'`

* `'connecting'` attempting to establish connection.
* `'reconnecting'` attempting to re-establish connection to one or more connectors.
* `'connected'` at least one connector is connected.
* `'disconnected'` no connection to any connector.

::: info You can use `status` to narrow the return type.
For example, when `status` is `'connected'` properties like `address` are guaranteed to be defined.

```ts twoslash
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"70621ff7ba048810d10cff60e35c82126a2beb12177fb38b972d09b620d6367c","data":""}
import { type GetConnectionReturnType } from '@wagmi/core'
const connection = {} as GetConnectionReturnType
// ---cut---
if (connection.status === 'connected') {
  connection
  // ^?















}
```

Or when status is `'disconnected'` properties like `address` are guaranteed to be `undefined`:

```ts twoslash
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"03f1cafa2983888b08080373baa176953254622dd97feb972d42875fedc5dd86","data":""}
import { type GetConnectionReturnType } from '@wagmi/core'
const connection = {} as GetConnectionReturnType
// ---cut---
if (connection.status === 'disconnected') {
  connection
  // ^?















}
```

:::

---

---
url: /core/api/actions/getConnections.md
---

# getConnectorClient

Action for getting a Viem [`Client`](https://viem.sh/docs/clients/custom) object for the current or provided connector.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getConnectorClient.md","from":298,"to":347}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getConnectorClient } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getConnectorClient.md","from":394,"to":526}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getConnectorClient } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const client = await getConnectorClient(config)
```

## Parameters

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getConnectorClient.md","from":597,"to":661}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetConnectorClientParameters } from '@wagmi/core'
```

### account

`Address | Account | undefined`

Account to use with client. Throws if account is not found on [`connector`](#connector).

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getConnectorClient.md","from":834,"to":1045}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getConnectorClient } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const client = await getConnectorClient(config, {
  account: '0xd2135CfB216b74109775236E36d4b433F1DF507B', // [!code focus]
})
```

### chainId

`config['chains'][number]['id'] | undefined`

ID of chain to use with client.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getConnectorClient.md","from":1219,"to":1441}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getConnectorClient } from '@wagmi/core'
import { mainnet } from '@wagmi/core/chains'
import { config } from './config'

const client = await getConnectorClient(config, {
  chainId: mainnet.id, // [!code focus]
})
```

### connector

`Connector | undefined`

* Connector to get client for.
* Defaults to current connector.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getConnectorClient.md","from":1628,"to":1881}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getConnections, getConnectorClient } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const connections = getConnections(config)
const client = await getConnectorClient(config, {
  connector: connections[0]?.connector, // [!code focus]
})
```

## Return Type

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getConnectorClient.md","from":1953,"to":2009}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetChainIdReturnType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

`Client`

Viem [`Client`](https://viem.sh/docs/clients/custom) object for the current or provided connector.

## Error

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getConnectorClient.md","from":2140,"to":2203}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetConnectorClientErrorType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

# getContractEvents

Action for fetching a list of contract event logs matching the provided parameters.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getContractEvents.md","from":259,"to":307}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getContractEvents } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

By default, `getContractEvents` returns all matched events on the ABI. In practice, you must use scoping to filter for specific events.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getContractEvents.md","from":491,"to":713}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getContractEvents } from '@wagmi/core'
import { abi } from './abi'
import { config } from './config'

// Fetch event logs for every event on every ERC-20 contract. 
const logs = getContractEvents(config, { abi })
```

## Parameters

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getContractEvents.md","from":820,"to":883}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetContractEventsParameters } from '@wagmi/core'
```

### abi

`Abi`

The contract's ABI. Check out the [TypeScript docs](/react/typescript#const-assert-abis-typed-data) for how to set up ABIs for maximum type inference and safety.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getContractEvents.md","from":1099,"to":1296}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getContractEvents } from '@wagmi/core'
import { abi } from './abi' // [!code focus]
import { config } from './config'

const logs = getContractEvents(config, {
  abi, // [!code focus]
})

```

### address

`Address | undefined`

The contract's address.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getContractEvents.md","from":1475,"to":1711}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getContractEvents } from '@wagmi/core'
import { abi } from './abi'
import { config } from './config'

const logs = getContractEvents(config, {
  address: '0x6b175474e89094c44da98b954eedeac495271d0f', // [!code focus]
  abi,
})
```

### args

`object | readonly unknown[] | undefined`

* Logs can be scoped to given indexed arguments.
* Inferred from [`abi`](#abi) and [`eventName`](#eventname).

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getContractEvents.md","from":1993,"to":2374}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getContractEvents } from '@wagmi/core'
import { abi } from './abi'
import { config } from './config'

const logs = getContractEvents(config, {
  abi,
  eventName: 'Transfer',
  args: { // [!code focus]
    from: '0xd8da6bf26964af9d7eed9e03e53415d37aa96045', // [!code focus]
    to: '0xd2135CfB216b74109775236E36d4b433F1DF507B', // [!code focus]
  }, // [!code focus]
})

```

Only indexed arguments in `event` are candidates for `args`.

An argument can also be an array to indicate that other values can exist in the position:

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getContractEvents.md","from":2645,"to":3163}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getContractEvents } from '@wagmi/core'
import { abi } from './abi'
import { config } from './config'

const logs = getContractEvents(config, {
  abi,
  eventName: 'Transfer',
  args: {
    from: '0xd8da6bf26964af9d7eed9e03e53415d37aa96045', 
    to: [ // [!code focus]
      '0xd2135CfB216b74109775236E36d4b433F1DF507B', // [!code focus]
      '0xa5cc3c03994db5b0d9a5eedd10cabab0813678ac', // [!code focus]
      '0xa152f8bb749c55e9943a3a0a3111d18ee2b3f94e', // [!code focus]
    ], // [!code focus]
  },
})

```

### blockHash

`` `0x${string}` | undefined ``

* Block hash to include logs from. Mutually exclusive with `fromBlock`/`toBlock`.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getContractEvents.md","from":3412,"to":3674}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getContractEvents } from '@wagmi/core'
import { abi } from './abi'
import { config } from './config'

const logs = getContractEvents(config, {
  abi,
  blockHash: '0x4ca7ee652d57678f26e887c149ab0735f41de37bcad58c9f6d3ed5824f15b74d', // [!code focus]
})
```

### chainId

`config['chains'][number]['id'] | undefined`

ID of chain to use when fetching data.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getContractEvents.md","from":3891,"to":4138}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getContractEvents } from '@wagmi/core'
import { mainnet } from '@wagmi/core/chains'
import { abi } from './abi'
import { config } from './config'

const logs = getContractEvents(config, {
  abi,
  chainId: mainnet.id, // [!code focus]
})
```

### eventName

`string | undefined`

* Event to filter for the contract.
* Inferred from [`abi`](#abi).

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getContractEvents.md","from":4361,"to":4565}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getContractEvents } from '@wagmi/core'
import { abi } from './abi'
import { config } from './config'

const logs = getContractEvents(config, {
  abi,
  eventName: 'Approval', // [!code focus]
})
```

### fromBlock

`bigint | 'latest' | 'earliest' | 'pending' | 'safe' | 'finalized' | undefined`

* Block to start including logs from. Mutually exclusive with `blockHash`.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getContractEvents.md","from":4856,"to":5056}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getContractEvents } from '@wagmi/core'
import { abi } from './abi'
import { config } from './config'

const logs = getContractEvents(config, {
  abi,
  fromBlock: 69420n, // [!code focus]
})
```

### strict

`boolean | undefined`

* Flag to only return logs that conform to the indexed & non-indexed arguments on the `event`, meaning that `args` will always be defined. Defaults to `false`.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getContractEvents.md","from":5370,"to":5565}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getContractEvents } from '@wagmi/core'
import { abi } from './abi'
import { config } from './config'

const logs = getContractEvents(config, {
  abi,
  strict: true, // [!code focus]
})
```

### toBlock

`bigint | 'latest' | 'earliest' | 'pending' | 'safe' | 'finalized' | undefined`

* Block to stop including logs from. Mutually exclusive with `blockHash`.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getContractEvents.md","from":5853,"to":6051}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getContractEvents } from '@wagmi/core'
import { abi } from './abi'
import { config } from './config'

const logs = getContractEvents(config, {
  abi,
  toBlock: 70120n, // [!code focus]
})
```

## Return Type

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getContractEvents.md","from":6159,"to":6222}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetContractEventsReturnType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

A list of event logs.

## Type Inference

With [`abi`](#abi) setup correctly, TypeScript will infer the correct types for [`eventName`](#eventname), [`args`](#args), and [`onLogs`](#onlogs) parameters. See the Wagmi [TypeScript docs](/core/typescript) for more information.

## Error

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getContractEvents.md","from":6518,"to":6576}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetContractEventsError } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## TanStack Query

```ts-vue
import {
  type {{typeName}}Data,
  type {{typeName}}Options,
  type {{typeName}}QueryFnData,
  type {{typeName}}QueryKey,
  {{actionName}}QueryKey,
  {{actionName}}QueryOptions,
} from '{{packageName}}/query'
```

## Viem

* [`getContractEvents`](https://viem.sh/docs/contract/getContractEvents)

# getEnsAddress

Action for fetching ENS address for name.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAddress.md","from":205,"to":249}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getEnsAddress } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAddress.md","from":296,"to":489}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getEnsAddress } from '@wagmi/core'
import { normalize } from 'viem/ens'
import { config } from './config'

const ensAddress = getEnsAddress(config, {
  name: normalize('wevm.eth'),
})
```

::: warning
Since ENS names prohibit certain forbidden characters (e.g. underscore) and have other validation rules, you likely want to [normalize ENS names](https://docs.ens.domains/contract-api-reference/name-processing#normalising-names) with [UTS-46 normalization](https://unicode.org/reports/tr46) before passing them to `getEnsAddress`. You can use Viem's built-in [`normalize`](https://viem.sh/docs/ens/utilities/normalize) function for this.
:::

## Parameters

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAddress.md","from":1015,"to":1074}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetEnsAddressParameters } from '@wagmi/core'
```

***

### blockNumber

`bigint | undefined`

Block number to get ENS address at.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAddress.md","from":1192,"to":1428}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getEnsAddress } from '@wagmi/core'
import { normalize } from 'viem/ens'
import { config } from './config'

const ensAddress = getEnsAddress(config, {
  blockNumber: 17829139n, // [!code focus]
  name: normalize('wevm.eth'),
})
```

### blockTag

`'latest' | 'earliest' | 'pending' | 'safe' | 'finalized' | undefined`

Block tag to get ENS address at.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAddress.md","from":1630,"to":1862}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getEnsAddress } from '@wagmi/core'
import { normalize } from 'viem/ens'
import { config } from './config'

const ensAddress = getEnsAddress(config, {
  blockTag: 'latest', // [!code focus]
  name: normalize('wevm.eth'),
})
```

***

### chainId

`config['chains'][number]['id'] | undefined`

ID of chain to use when fetching data.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAddress.md","from":2048,"to":2332}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getEnsAddress } from '@wagmi/core'
import { mainnet } from '@wagmi/core/chains'
import { normalize } from 'viem/ens'
import { config } from './config'

const ensAddress = await getEnsAddress(config, {
  chainId: mainnet.id, // [!code focus]
  name: normalize('wevm.eth'),
})
```

### coinType

`number | undefined`

The [ENSIP-9](https://docs.ens.domains/ens-improvement-proposals/ensip-9-multichain-address-resolution) coin type to fetch the address for.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAddress.md","from":2591,"to":2823}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getEnsAddress } from '@wagmi/core'
import { normalize } from 'viem/ens'
import { config } from './config'

const ensAddress = await getEnsAddress(config, {
  coinType: 60, // [!code focus]
  name: normalize('wevm.eth'),
})
```

### name

`string`

Name to get the address for.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAddress.md","from":2955,"to":3171}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getEnsAddress } from '@wagmi/core'
import { normalize } from 'viem/ens'
import { config } from './config'

const ensAddress = await getEnsAddress(config, {
  name: normalize('wevm.eth'), // [!code focus]
})
```

### universalResolverAddress

`Address | undefined`

* Address of ENS Universal Resolver Contract.
* Defaults to current chain's Universal Resolver Contract address.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAddress.md","from":3420,"to":3710}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getEnsAddress } from '@wagmi/core'
import { normalize } from 'viem/ens'
import { config } from './config'

const ensAddress = await getEnsAddress(config, {
  name: normalize('wevm.eth'),
  universalResolverAddress: '0x74E20Bd2A1fE0cdbe45b9A1d89cb7e0a45b36376', // [!code focus]
})
```

## Return Type

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAddress.md","from":3782,"to":3841}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetEnsAddressReturnType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

`string`

ENS address.

## Error

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAddress.md","from":3886,"to":3944}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetEnsAddressErrorType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

# getEnsAvatar

Action for fetching ENS address for avatar.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAvatar.md","from":204,"to":247}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getEnsAvatar } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAvatar.md","from":294,"to":490}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getEnsAvatar } from '@wagmi/core'
import { normalize } from 'viem/ens'
import { config } from './config'

const ensAvatar = await getEnsAvatar(config, {
  name: normalize('wevm.eth'),
})
```

::: warning
Since ENS names prohibit certain forbidden characters (e.g. underscore) and have other validation rules, you likely want to [normalize ENS names](https://docs.ens.domains/contract-api-reference/name-processing#normalising-names) with [UTS-46 normalization](https://unicode.org/reports/tr46) before passing them to `getEnsAvatar`. You can use Viem's built-in [`normalize`](https://viem.sh/docs/ens/utilities/normalize) function for this.
:::

## Parameters

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAvatar.md","from":1015,"to":1073}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetEnsAvatarParameters } from '@wagmi/core'
```

***

### assetGatewayUrls&#x20;

`{ ipfs?: string | undefined; arweave?: string | undefined } | undefined`

Gateway urls to resolve IPFS and/or Arweave assets.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAvatar.md","from":1295,"to":1610}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getEnsAvatar } from '@wagmi/core'
import { normalize } from 'viem/ens'
import { config } from './config'

const ensAvatar = await getEnsAvatar(config, {
  assetGatewayUrls: { // [!code focus]
    ipfs: 'https://cloudflare-ipfs.com', // [!code focus]
  }, // [!code focus]
  name: normalize('wevm.eth'),
})
```

### blockNumber

`bigint | undefined`

Block number to get avatar at.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAvatar.md","from":1764,"to":2003}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getEnsAvatar } from '@wagmi/core'
import { normalize } from 'viem/ens'
import { config } from './config'

const ensAvatar = await getEnsAvatar(config, {
  blockNumber: 17829139n, // [!code focus]
  name: normalize('wevm.eth'),
})
```

### blockTag

`'latest' | 'earliest' | 'pending' | 'safe' | 'finalized' | undefined`

Block tag to get avatar at.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAvatar.md","from":2200,"to":2435}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

import { normalize } from 'viem/ens'

  blockTag: 'latest', // [!code focus]
  name: normalize('wevm.eth'),
})
```

***

### chainId

`config['chains'][number]['id'] | undefined`

ID of chain to use when fetching data.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAvatar.md","from":2621,"to":2902}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

import { normalize } from 'viem/ens'
import { config } from './config'

  chainId: mainnet.id, // [!code focus]
  name: normalize('wevm.eth'),
})
```

### gatewayUrls

`string[] | undefined`

A set of Universal Resolver gateways, used for resolving CCIP-Read requests made through the ENS Universal Resolver Contract.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAvatar.md","from":3152,"to":3414}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

import { normalize } from 'viem/ens'
import { config } from './config'

const ensAvatar = await getEnsAvatar(config, {
  gatewayUrls: ['https://cloudflare-ipfs.com'] { // [!code focus]
  name: normalize('wevm.eth'),
})
```

### name

`string`

Name to get the avatar for.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsAvatar.md","from":3545,"to":3758}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

  name: normalize('wevm.eth'), // [!code focus]
})
```

`Address | undefined`

* Address of ENS Universal Resolver Contract.
* Defaults to current chain's Universal Resolver Contract address.

# getEnsResolver

Action for fetching ENS resolver for name.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsResolver.md","from":209,"to":254}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getEnsResolver } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsResolver.md","from":301,"to":497}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getEnsResolver } from '@wagmi/core'
import { normalize } from 'viem/ens'
import { config } from './config'

const ensResolver = getEnsResolver(config, {
  name: normalize('wevm.eth'),
})
```

::: warning
Since ENS names prohibit certain forbidden characters (e.g. underscore) and have other validation rules, you likely want to [normalize ENS names](https://docs.ens.domains/contract-api-reference/name-processing#normalising-names) with [UTS-46 normalization](https://unicode.org/reports/tr46) before passing them to `getEnsResolver`. You can use Viem's built-in [`normalize`](https://viem.sh/docs/ens/utilities/normalize) function for this.
:::

## Parameters

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsResolver.md","from":1024,"to":1084}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

```

# getEnsText

Action for fetching a text record for a specified ENS name and key.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsText.md","from":222,"to":263}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getEnsText.md","from":310,"to":516}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

import { normalize } from 'viem/ens'
import { config } from './config'

const ensText = getEnsText(config, {
  name: normalize('wevm.eth'),
  key: 'com.twitter',
})
```

::: warning
Since ENS names prohibit certain forbidden characters (e.g. underscore) and have other validation rules, you likely want to [normalize ENS names](https://docs.ens.domains/contract-api-reference/name-processing#normalising-names) with [UTS-46 normalization](https://unicode.org/reports/tr46) before passing them to `getEnsText`. You can use Viem's built-in [`normalize`](https://viem.sh/docs/ens/utilities/normalize) function for this.
:::

### blockCount

`number`

Number of blocks in the requested range. Between 1 and 1024 blocks can be requested in a single query. Less than requested may be returned if not all blocks are available.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getFeeHistory.md","from":862,"to":1057}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getFeeHistory } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const feeHistory = await getFeeHistory(config, {
  blockCount: 4, // [!code focus]
  rewardPercentiles: [25, 75]
})
```

### rewardPercentiles

`number[]`

A monotonically increasing list of percentile values to sample from each block's effective priority fees per gas in ascending order, weighted by gas used.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getFeeHistory.md","from":1330,"to":1525}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getFeeHistory } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const feeHistory = await getFeeHistory(config, {
  blockCount: 4,
  rewardPercentiles: [25, 75] // [!code focus]
})
```

### blockNumber

`bigint | undefined`

Highest number block of the requested range.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getFeeHistory.md","from":1692,"to":1913}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getFeeHistory } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const feeHistory = await getFeeHistory(config, {
  blockCount: 4,
  blockNumber: 1551231n, // [!code focus]
  rewardPercentiles: [25, 75],
})
```

### blockTag

`'latest' | 'earliest' | 'pending' | 'safe' | 'finalized' | undefined`

Block tag of the highest number block of the requested range.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getFeeHistory.md","from":2144,"to":2360}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getFeeHistory } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const feeHistory = await getFeeHistory(config, {
  blockCount: 4,
  blockTag: 'safe', // [!code focus]
  rewardPercentiles: [25, 75],
})
```

### chainId

`config['chains'][number]['id'] | undefined`

ID of chain to use when fetching data.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getFeeHistory.md","from":2541,"to":2805}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getFeeHistory } from '@wagmi/core'
import { mainnet } from '@wagmi/core/chains'
import { config } from './config'

const feeHistory = await getFeeHistory(config, {
  blockCount: 4,
  chainId: mainnet.id, // [!code focus]
  rewardPercentiles: [25, 75],
})
```

## Return Type

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getFeeHistory.md","from":2877,"to":2936}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetFeeHistoryReturnType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

[`FeeHistory`](https://viem.sh/docs/glossary/types#feehistory)

The fee history.

## Error

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getFeeHistory.md","from":3039,"to":3097}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetFeeHistoryErrorType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

# getProof

Action for return the account and storage values of the specified account including the Merkle-proof.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getProof.md","from":250,"to":289}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getProof } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getProof.md","from":336,"to":591}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getProof } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

await getProof(config, {
  address: '0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000016',
  storageKeys: [
    '0x4a932049252365b3eedbc5190e18949f2ec11f39d3bef2d259764799a1b27d99',
  ],
})
```

## Parameters

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getProof.md","from":662,"to":716}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetProofParameters } from '@wagmi/core'
```

### address

`Address`

The account address to get the proof for.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getProof.md","from":820,"to":1092}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

import { config } from './config'

await getProof(config, {
  address: '0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000016', // [!code focus]
  storageKeys: [
    '0x4a932049252365b3eedbc5190e18949f2ec11f39d3bef2d259764799a1b27d99',
  ],
})
```

### storageKeys

`` `0x${string}`[] ``

Array of storage-keys that should be proofed and included.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getProof.md","from":1274,"to":1548}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

import { config } from './config'

await getProof(config, {
  address: '0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000016',
  storageKeys: [ // [!code focus:3]
    '0x4a932049252365b3eedbc5190e18949f2ec11f39d3bef2d259764799a1b27d99',
  ],
})
```

### blockNumber

`bigint | undefined`

Proof at a given block number.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getProof.md","from":1701,"to":1996}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

import { config } from './config'

  address: '0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000016',
  blockNumber: 42069n, // [!code focus]
  storageKeys: [
    '0x4a932049252365b3eedbc5190e18949f2ec11f39d3bef2d259764799a1b27d99',
  ],
})
```

### blockTag

`'latest' | 'earliest' | 'pending' | 'safe' | 'finalized' | undefined`

Proof at a given block tag.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getProof.md","from":2193,"to":2487}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

import { config } from './config'

  address: '0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000016',
  blockTag: 'latest', // [!code focus]
  storageKeys: [
    '0x4a932049252365b3eedbc5190e18949f2ec11f39d3bef2d259764799a1b27d99',
  ],
})
```

### chainId

`config['chains'][number]['id'] | undefined`

The ID of chain to get the proof for.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getProof.md","from":2667,"to":3009}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

import { config } from './config'
import { optimism } from '@wagmi/core/chains'

  chainId: optimism.id, // [!code focus]
  address: '0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000016',
  storageKeys: [
    '0x4a932049252365b3eedbc5190e18949f2ec11f39d3bef2d259764799a1b27d99',
  ],
})
```

## Return Type


# getPublicClient

Action for getting Viem [`PublicClient`](https://viem.sh/docs/clients/public) instance.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getPublicClient.md","from":125,"to":171}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getPublicClient } from '@wagmi/core'
```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getPublicClient.md","from":218,"to":338}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { getPublicClient } from '@wagmi/core'
import { config } from './config'

const client = getPublicClient(config)
```

::: warning
If you want to optimize bundle size, you should use [`getClient`](/core/api/actions/getClient) along with Viem's [tree-shakable actions](https://viem.sh/docs/clients/custom#tree-shaking) instead. Since Public Client has all public actions attached directly to it.
:::

## Parameters

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getPublicClient.md","from":690,"to":745}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

```

### chainId

`config['chains'][number]['id'] | undefined`

ID of chain to use when getting Viem Public Client.

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getPublicClient.md","from":894,"to":1104}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

import { mainnet } from '@wagmi/core/chains'
import { config } from './config'

const client = getPublicClient(config, {
  chainId: mainnet.id, // [!code focus]
})
```

## Return Type

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getPublicClient.md","from":1176,"to":1237}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { type GetPublicClientReturnType } from '@wagmi/core'
```

`PublicClient | undefined`

Viem [`PublicClient`](https://viem.sh/docs/clients/public) instance.

# getStorageAt

Action for returning the value from a storage slot at a given address.

## Import

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getStorageAt.md","from":231,"to":274}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>

```

## Usage

::: code-group

```ts [index.ts]

import { config } from './config'

await getStorageAt(config, {
  address: '0xFBA3912Ca04dd458c843e2EE08967fC04f3579c2',
  slot: '0x0',
})
```

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/core/api/actions/getStorageAt.md","from":574,"to":632}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
```

# Getting Started

## Overview

Wagmi CLI is a command line interface for managing ABIs (from Etherscan/block explorers, Foundry/Hardhat projects, etc.), generating code (e.g. React Hooks), and much more. It makes working with Ethereum easier by automating manual work so you can build faster. You can learn more about the rationale behind the project in the [Why Wagmi CLI](/cli/why) section.

## Manual Installation

To manually add Wagmi CLI to your project, install the required packages.

::: code-group

```bash [pnpm]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/getting-started.md","from":524,"to":547}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
pnpm add -D @wagmi/cli
```

```bash [npm]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/getting-started.md","from":566,"to":600}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
npm install --save-dev @wagmi/cli
```

```bash [yarn]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/getting-started.md","from":620,"to":643}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
yarn add -D @wagmi/cli
```

```bash [bun]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/getting-started.md","from":662,"to":684}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
bun add -D @wagmi/cli
```

:::

## Create Config File

Run the `init` command to generate a configuration file: either `wagmi.config.ts` if TypeScript is detected, otherwise `wagmi.config.js`. You can also create the configuration file manually. See [Configuring CLI](/cli/config/configuring-cli) for more info.

::: code-group

```bash [pnpm]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/getting-started.md","from":1004,"to":1020}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
pnpm wagmi init
```

```bash [npm]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/getting-started.md","from":1039,"to":1054}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
npx wagmi init
```

```bash [yarn]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/getting-started.md","from":1074,"to":1090}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
yarn wagmi init
```

```bash [bun]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/getting-started.md","from":1109,"to":1124}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
bun wagmi init
```

:::

The generated configuration file will look something like this:

::: code-group

```ts [wagmi.config.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/getting-started.md","from":1237,"to":1372}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'

export default defineConfig({
  out: 'src/generated.ts',
  contracts: [],
  plugins: [],
})
```

:::

## Add Contracts And Plugins

Once the configuration file is set up, you can add contracts and plugins to it. These contracts and plugins are used to manage ABIs (fetch from block explorers, resolve from the file system, etc.), generate code (React hooks, etc.), and much more!

For example, we can add the ERC-20 contract from Viem, and the [`etherscan`](/cli/api/plugins/etherscan) and [`react`](/cli/api/plugins/react) plugins.

::: code-group

```ts{2,3,9-12,15-27,28} [wagmi.config.ts]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/getting-started.md","from":1871,"to":2570}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { defineConfig } from '@wagmi/cli'
import { etherscan, react } from '@wagmi/cli/plugins'
import { erc20Abi } from 'viem'
import { mainnet, sepolia } from 'wagmi/chains'
 
export default defineConfig({
  out: 'src/generated.ts',
  contracts: [
    {
      name: 'erc20',
      abi: erc20Abi,
    },
  ],
  plugins: [
    etherscan({
      apiKey: process.env.ETHERSCAN_API_KEY!,
      chainId: mainnet.id,
      contracts: [
        {
          name: 'EnsRegistry',
          address: {
            [mainnet.id]: '0x314159265dd8dbb310642f98f50c066173c1259b',
            [sepolia.id]: '0x112234455c3a32fd11230c42e7bccd4a84e02010',
          },
        },
      ],
    }),
    react(),
  ],
})
```

:::

## Run Code Generation

Now that we added a few contracts and plugins to the configuration file, we can run the [`generate`](/cli/api/commands/generate) command to resolve ABIs and generate code to the `out` file.

::: code-group

```bash [pnpm]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/getting-started.md","from":2824,"to":2844}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
pnpm wagmi generate
```

```bash [npm]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/getting-started.md","from":2863,"to":2882}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
npx wagmi generate
```

```bash [yarn]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/getting-started.md","from":2902,"to":2922}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
yarn wagmi generate
```

```bash [bun]
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/getting-started.md","from":2941,"to":2960}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
bun wagmi generate
```

:::

In this example, the `generate` command will do the following:

* Validate the `etherscan` and `react` plugins
* Fetch and cache the ENS Registry ABI from the Mainnet Etherscan API
* Pull in the `erc20Abi` using the name `'ERC20'`
* Generate React Hooks for both ABIs
* Save ABIs, ENS Registry deployment addresses, and React Hooks to the `out` file

## Use Generated Code

Once `out` is created, you can start using the generated code in your project.

```ts
// <fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>{"path":"/vercel/path0/site/cli/getting-started.md","from":3429,"to":3914}<fsm-8cgkku8e2j6>
import { useReadErc20, useReadErc20BalanceOf } from './generated'

// Use the generated ERC-20 read hook
const { data } = useReadErc20({
  address: '0xa0b86991c6218b36c1d19d4a2e9eb0ce3606eb48',
  functionName: 'balanceOf',
  args: ['0xA0Cf798816D4b9b9866b5330EEa46a18382f251e'],
})

// Use the generated ERC-20 "balanceOf" hook
const { data } = useReadErc20BalanceOf({
  address: '0xa0b86991c6218b36c1d19d4a2e9eb0ce3606eb48',
  args: ['0xA0Cf798816D4b9b9866b5330EEa46a18382f251e'],
})
```

::: tip
Instead of committing the `out` file, you likely want to add `out` to your `.gitignore` and run `generate` during the build process or before you start your dev server in a `"predev"` script.
:::

## Next Steps

For more information on what to do next, check out the following topics.

* [**Configuring CLI**](/cli/config/configuring-cli) Learn how to configure the CLI to work best for your project.
* [**Commands**](/cli/api/commands) Learn more about the CLI commands and how to use them.
* [**Plugins**](/cli/api/plugins) Browse the collection of plugins and set them up with your config.
